slide1.title: Africa’s Verification Layer for Global Commerce
slide1.description: Emara connects verified exporters and international buyers through structured compliance, transparent trade data, and audit-backed credibility.

slide2.title: Source Verified Exporters With Confidence
slide2.description: Access audit-backed suppliers, compliance records, and transparent trade history — all within one trusted ecosystem.

slide3.title: Become Globally Buyer-Ready
slide3.description: Showcase your compliance, certifications, and trade performance to serious international buyers worldwide.

TheProblem.section_description: Exporters face fragmented compliance, delayed approvals, and lack of transparency — all of which slow growth and reduce revenue. Emara solves these pain points by connecting verified suppliers with global buyers efficiently.
TheProblem.problem1_description: Multiple certifications, scattered documents, and opaque approval processes slow your trade.
TheProblem.problem2_description: International buyers need trust — manual verification is slow and error-prone.
TheProblem.problem3_description: Every delay or missing document risks contracts and revenue.
TheProblem.problem4_description: Keeping track of compliance and export readiness across markets eats hours every day.
